channel.title: Microsoft Learn - in Intune
channel.description: The latest updates from Microsoft Learn in Intune

item.title: Configure Endpoint Analytics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Step-by-step guide to configure endpoint analytics in Microsoft Intune, enroll devices, and manage data collection policies for device insights.

item.title: iOS/iPadOS device enrollment guide for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll iOS and iPadOS devices using user and device enrollment, automated device enrollment (DEP), and Apple Configurator in Microsoft Intune. Decide which enrollment method to use, and get an overview of the administrator and end user tasks to enroll devices.

item.title: Set up automated device enrollment (ADE) for iOS/iPadOS - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enroll corporate-owned iOS/iPadOS devices into Microsoft Intune with Apple Automated Device Enrollment (ADE).

item.title: Get started with macOS endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune guide to set up and configure macOS devices from setup to creating policies and enrolling devices. You secure your corporate and organization-owned endpoints that are enrolled in Intune, and then deploy at scale with Apple Business Manager or Apple School Manager.

item.title: Add the Company Portal for macOS App - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Add the macOS Company Portal app.

item.title: iOS/iPadOS App Protection Policy Settings - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes the iOS/iPadOS app protection policy (APP) settings for iOS/iPadOS devices.

item.title: Manage Apple Volume-Purchased Apps - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to sync apps you bought in volume through Apple Business Manager with Microsoft Intune. Then manage and track these apps on iOS/iPadOS and macOS devices.

item.title: Add Microsoft Store Apps to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about adding Microsoft Store apps to Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Add App Configuration Policies for Managed iOS/iPadOS Devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to use app configuration policies to provide configuration data to an iOS/iPadOS app when it's run.

item.title: Add a Windows Line-of-Business App to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to add a Windows line-of-business (LOB) app using Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Assign Apps to Groups in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to assign an Intune app to groups of users or devices using Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Step 5 – Enroll devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll Android, Android Enterprise, iOS, iPadOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows devices in Intune.

item.title: Add Apps to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to add apps to Microsoft Intune so you can assign apps to users and devices. Intune supports a wide range of app types.

item.title: In development - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes Microsoft Intune features that are in development.

item.title: Add Web Apps to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about adding web apps (client-server applications) to Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Add App Configuration Policies for Managed Android Enterprise Devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use app configuration policies in Microsoft Intune to supply settings when users run a Managed Google Play app.

item.title: App Protection Policy Settings for Windows - Microsoft Intune
item.description: This article describes the app protection policy (APP) settings for MAM on Windows.

item.title: Add iOS Store Apps to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about adding iOS store apps to Microsoft Intune. You can assign apps using this method if the apps are free of charge in the App Store.

item.title: Monitor App Information and Assignments - Microsoft Intune
item.description: After you assign an app to users or devices, use this information to help you monitor the app's status.

item.title: How to Add macOS Line-of-Business Apps to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about how to add macOS line-of-business (LOB) apps to Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Add an Android Line-of-Business App to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about how to add a Android line-of-business (LOB) app to Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Configuration Policies for Intune App SDK Managed Apps - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to configure policies for Intune App SDK managed apps.

item.title: Create Quiet Time Policies in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to create quiet time policies for iOS/iPadOS and Android apps.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Remove Passcode - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune remove passcode action helps you unlock devices remotely when users forget their passcodes. Discover how to use this feature.

item.title: iOS/iPadOS App Provisioning Profiles in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Intune gives you the tools to proactively assign a new provisioning profile to devices that have apps that are nearing expiry.

item.title: Set up local admin account creation and password management for macOS devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up macOS account configuration with LAPS through automatic device enrollment for macOS devices in Intune.

item.title: Add Microsoft Store Apps to Intune (Legacy) - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about adding Microsoft Store (legacy) apps to Intune.

item.title: Validate Your App Protection Policy Setup - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to test that your app protection policy is set up and working correctly in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Set up a macOS ADE token in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Create, renew, and delete Apple enrollment program tokens for macOS automated device enrollment in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Apple School Manager Program enrollment for iOS/iPadOS devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to set up Microsoft Intune with Apple School Manager for corporate-owned iOS/iPadOS devices.

item.title: Intune shared device settings for the iOS/iPadOS Classroom app - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn the Intune settings you can use to control settings for the Classroom app on shared iOS/iPadOS devices.

item.title: Set up an iOS/iPadOS ADE token in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Create, renew, and delete Apple enrollment program tokens in Microsoft Intune for automated device enrollment on iOS/iPadOS.

item.title: macOS device enrollment guide for Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Enroll macOS devices using device enrollment, automated device enrollment (DEP), and Apple Configurator enrollment options in Microsoft Intune. Decide which enrollment method to use, and get an overview of the administrator and end user tasks to enroll devices.

item.title: Set up automated device enrollment (ADE) for macOS - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to enroll corporate-owned Macs into Microsoft Intune with Apple Automated Device Enrollment (ADE).

item.title: Update your workloads to support cloud-native endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: To support hybrid and remote workers, convert or migrate your workloads to support cloud-native endpoints. This planning guide focuses on deploying apps and updates with Intune, moving from Group Policy Objects, and using Windows Autopilot.

item.title: Manage iOS/iPadOS ADE devices and tokens in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Sync devices, distribute devices, and re-enroll devices for Apple automated device enrollment on iOS/iPadOS in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Manage Volume-Purchased iOS/iPadOS eBooks - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to sync books you purchased in volume from the iOS store with Intune. You can then manage and track usage.

item.title: Join your cloud-native endpoints to Microsoft Entra - Microsoft Intune
item.description: When moving to or using cloud-native endpoints, use Microsoft Entra joined endpoints. When your endpoints are joined to Microsoft Entra, you can use Windows Autopilot to provision or get devices ready for organization use. Learn more about the benefits to IT admins and end-users.

item.title: Manage Volume-Purchased Apps and Books with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about how you can use Microsoft Intune to manage and monitor your use of volume-purchased apps and books from stores."

item.title: Common issues and resolutions with cloud-native endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn more about the known and resolutions when using cloud-native endpoints. Use user-based authentication; don't use machine authentication. Existing group policy objects might not apply.

item.title: Add Android Store Apps to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to add Android store apps from the Google Play store to Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Overview of Apple Automated Device Enrollment for macOS in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about automated device enrollment (ADE) for Mac computers in Microsoft Intune, including supported scenarios, key features, and how to get started.

item.title: Manage macOS ADE devices and tokens in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Sync devices, assign enrollment profiles, and distribute Mac computers for Apple automated device enrollment in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Overview of Apple Automated Device Enrollment for iOS/iPadOS in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn about automated device enrollment (ADE) for Apple mobile devices in Microsoft Intune, including supported scenarios, key features, and how to get started.

item.title: Help Desk Troubleshooting Dashboard - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Help desk staff use the troubleshooting pane to solve users' technical problems.

item.title: What's new in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Find out what's new in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Monitor results of your device compliance policies in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use the device compliance dashboard to understand overall device compliance the per policy and per setting device compliance results.

item.title: Assign Microsoft Intune licenses - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Assign licenses to users so they can enroll in Intune

item.title: Get support in the Microsoft Intune admin center - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Get online and telephone support for Microsoft Intune and other device management cloud services from within the Microsoft Intune admin center.

item.title: Endpoint management services and solutions at Microsoft - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune is a family of on-premises products and cloud services. It includes Intune, Configuration Manager, co-management, Endpoint Analytics, Windows Autopilot, and the admin center to manage cloud devices and on on-premises.

item.title: Enable Unlicensed Administrator Access to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to allow administrators to access Microsoft Intune without an Intune license by enabling unlicensed admin access in the admin center.

item.title: What is Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Microsoft Intune manages users and devices, simplifies app management and automated policy deployment, and integrates with mobile threat defense. It connects to Managed Google Play, Apple tokens and certificates, and Teamviewer for remote assistance. Can use MDM or MAM to protect data, configure devices, and simplify access to company resources.

item.title: Manage approved apps for Windows devices with App Control for Business policy and Managed Installers in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Use App Control for Business policies and a managed installer to manage which apps are approved to run on Windows devices that you manage with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Planning guide to move to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Plan, design, implement, adopt, and move to Microsoft Intune. Get guidance and advice to determine goals, use-case scenarios and requirements, and create rollout and communication plans, support, testing, and validation plans.

item.title: Kiosk settings for Windows and Holographic devices in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Configure your Windows 10/11 and Windows Holographic for Business devices as single-app and multi-app kiosks, customize the start menu, add apps, show the task bar, and configure a web browser in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Migration guide to Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Deployment guide to set up, onboard, or move to Intune. These steps include moving from partner MDM providers, using co-management, moving from on-premises group policy, and moving from Office 365 device management.

item.title: Manage and secure devices overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Get an overview of the concepts and features you should know when managing devices that access organization resources in Microsoft Intune. You can manage new and existing devices, including BYOD personal devices, check health compliance and view reports, configure device features, and secure devices using mobile threat solutions.

item.title: Get started with Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: See an overview of the steps to start using Intune. Plan your move and deployment of Intune, determine your licensing needs and any platform requirements, use compliance and Conditional Access, deploy apps, create device configuration profiles, and enroll your devices to be managed. Get more information on mobile application management for BYOD or personal devices.

item.title: Manage and secure user and group identities overview - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Get an overview of the concepts and features you should know when managing identities in Microsoft Intune. Use existing users and groups, control access using RBAC, establish user affinity, and secure and authenticate users.

item.title: Get started with frontline worker (FLW) device management - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage frontline worker devices using Android, iOS/iPadOS, and Windows devices in Microsoft Intune. Get guidance on device use and Intune features built for FLW, like Remote Help. Also, learn about Microsoft Entra shared device mode (SDM) for FLW.

item.title: Get started with Windows frontline worker devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage frontline worker devices using Windows devices in Microsoft Intune. Select the best enrollment option, configure the home screen, and more.

item.title: What are cloud-native Windows endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn more about cloud-native endpoints and what they are. See a list of benefits, and the effect on end users and IT administrators. Cloud-native endpoints help with remote workers and hybrid workers, and use Microsoft Intune to manage devices.

item.title: Get started with Android frontline worker devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage frontline worker devices using Android devices in Microsoft Intune. Select the best enrollment option, configure the home screen, and more.

item.title: Get started with iOS/iPadOS frontline worker devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to manage frontline worker devices using iOS and iPadOS devices in Microsoft Intune. Select the best enrollment option, configure the home screen, and more.

item.title: Tutorial-Get started with cloud-native Windows endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Set up secure cloud-native Windows endpoints that are Microsoft Entra joined, enrolled in Intune, and then deploy at scale with Windows Autopilot.

item.title: Use on-premises services with cloud-native endpoints - Microsoft Intune
item.description: For cloud-native endpoints to access on-premises resources, such as file servers, printers, and web servers, use Windows integrated authentication (WIA) and Microsoft Entra Connect.

item.title: Tutorial - Protect Exchange Online email on managed iOS devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Secure Exchange Online email on iOS devices by using Microsoft Intune compliance policies and Microsoft Entra Conditional Access to require managed devices and the Outlook app.

item.title: Remote Device Action: Collect Diagnostics - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Learn how to collect diagnostics with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Intune Data Platform Schema - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Review the Microsoft Intune data platform schema for device queries and inventory. Discover supported properties and data types to efficiently manage and report on your devices with Intune.

item.title: Default configuration of Intune's Windows security baselines - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View the default setting configuration of the various Microsoft Intune security baselines for Windows.

item.title: Learn about Intune security baselines for Windows devices - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Deploy security baselines that have preset and recommended configurations to the Windows devices you manage with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Configure security baseline policies in Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Deploy security baselines that establish a default and recommended security postures on Windows devices you manage with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Settings list for the Microsoft Intune security baseline for Microsoft Defender for Endpoint - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View the settings in the Microsoft Intune security baseline for Microsoft Defender for Endpoint and each settings default value.

item.title: List of settings for the Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise security baseline in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View a list of the settings in the Microsoft Intune security baseline for Microsoft Office apps. This list includes the default values for settings as found in the default configuration of the baseline.

item.title: Monitor security baselines deployed by Microsoft Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: Monitor device and per-setting results of security baselines you deploy with Microsoft Intune, and identify conflicts for devices.

item.title: List of settings for the Microsoft HoloLens 2 advanced security baseline in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View a list of the settings in the Microsoft Intune advanced security baseline for Microsoft HoloLens 2. This list includes the default values for settings as found in the default configuration of the baseline.

item.title: List of settings for the Microsoft Edge security baseline in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View a list of the settings in the Microsoft Intune security baseline version 112 and later, for the Microsoft Edge browser. This list includes the default values for settings as found in the default configuration of the baseline.

item.title: List of settings for the Microsoft HoloLens 2 standard security baseline in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View a list of the settings in the Microsoft Intune standard security baseline for Microsoft HoloLens 2. This list includes the default values for settings as found in the default configuration of the baseline.

item.title: Settings list for the Windows 365 Cloud PC security baseline in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View a list of the settings in the Microsoft Intune security baseline for Windows 365 Cloud PC. This list includes the default values for settings as found in the default configuration of the baseline.

item.title: Settings list for the Microsoft Edge security baseline in Intune - Microsoft Intune
item.description: View a list of the settings in the Microsoft Intune security baseline for Microsoft Edge browser. This list includes the default values for settings as found in the default configuration of the baseline.

item.title: Troubleshooting Windows device enrollment problems in Intune - Intune
item.description: Suggestions for troubleshooting some of the most common error messages when you enroll Windows devices in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot device enrollment in Intune - Intune
item.description: Suggestions for troubleshooting device enrollment issues in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Troubleshooting app installation issues with Intune - Intune
item.description: How to use the Microsoft Intune troubleshooting pane to help you troubleshoot app installation issues.

item.title: Troubleshooting iOS/iPadOS device enrollment errors in Microsoft Intune - Intune
item.description: Suggestions for troubleshooting some of the most common enrollment and sync token errors when enrolling iOS/iPadOS devices in Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot the Enrollment Status Page (ESP) - Intune
item.description: General troubleshooting guide for the Enrollment Status Page (ESP) for Windows Autopilot or OOBE for Microsoft Entra join.

item.title: Known issues with Microsoft Intune - Intune
item.description: Learn about known issues with Microsoft Intune, including workarounds and updated fixes.

item.title: Intune Profile installation failed on iOS/iPadOS device in Intune - Intune
item.description: Troubleshoot when an Intune profile fails to install on an iOS or iPadOS device.

item.title: Deploy OMA-URIs to target a CSP through Intune, and a comparison to on-premises - Intune
item.description: This article describes the significance of CSPs, Open Mobile Alliance – Uniform Resources (OMA-URIs), and how custom mobile device management (MDM) policies are delivered to a Windows 10-based device with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Error and status codes in Microsoft Intune - Azure - Intune
item.description: See a list of the errors, status code, descriptions, and resolutions when using MDM managed devices, getting access to company resources, errors on iOS/iPadOS devices, and OMA response errors in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot managed device to Network Device Enrollment Service (NDES) communication in Microsoft Intune - Intune
item.description: Troubleshoot managed device to NDES server communication when using Simple Certificate Enrollment Protocol (SCEP) certificate profiles to deploy certificates with Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot error 806 or 808 when importing Windows Autopilot CSV files - Intune
item.description: Describes an issue in which you receive the ZtdDeviceAlreadyAssigned (806) or ZtdDeviceAssignedToOtherTenant (808) error message when you import Windows Autopilot device CSV files in Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot policies and configuration profiles in Microsoft Intune - Intune
item.description: Learn how to use the built-in Intune troubleshooting feature, and get guidance for common problems or issues with compliance policies and configuration profiles in Microsoft Intune

item.title: Troubleshoot use of Simple Certificate Enrollment Protocol (SCEP) certificate profiles to provision certificates with Microsoft Intune - Intune
item.description: Troubleshoot the use of SCEP by devices to request certificates for use with Intune, including communication from devices to Network Device Enrollment Service (NDES), NDES to certification authorities, and from the Intune Certificate Connector to the Intune service.

item.title: Troubleshooting BitLocker policies from the client side - Intune
item.description: How to troubleshoot BitLocker encryption issues on the client side for Windows devices you manage with Microsoft Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot auto-enrolling existing Configuration Manager devices in Intune - Intune
item.description: Helps you understand and troubleshoot issues when you set up co-management by taking Path 1 - Auto-enroll existing Configuration Manager-managed devices into Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot Microsoft Intune app protection policy deployment - Intune
item.description: This article gives troubleshooting guidance for IT Admins with issues when deploying Intune app protection policies.

item.title: Troubleshoot use of PKCS certificate profiles to provision certificates with Microsoft Intune - Intune
item.description: Troubleshoot the use of Public Key Cryptography Standards (PKCS) profiles by devices to request certificates for use with Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot Update ring policies for Windows devices - Intune
item.description: Provides troubleshooting guidance for configuring Update ring policies for Windows 10 and Windows 11 devices in Intune.

item.title: Troubleshoot and review Wi-Fi device configuration profiles in Intune - Intune
item.description: Understand and troubleshoot Wi-Fi device configuration profile issues on Android, iOS/iPadOS, and Windows devices in Microsoft Intune. Review logs, and see some common issues and possible resolutions.

item.title: Troubleshoot Windows 10 Group Policy auto-enrollment in Microsoft Intune - Intune
item.description: Learn how to troubleshoot auto-enrollment.
